<!--
Thanks for submitting an app to Openpak!

Open this pull request against the `new-pr` branch.
Add your manifest at the repo ROOT as `<app-id>.{yaml,yml,json}`, on a branch
named after your app id (e.g. `io.github.you.App`).

Openpak judges the work, not the workflow — AI-assisted and AI-generated
contributions are welcome. We gate on quality, maintenance, and good faith.
-->

#### Please confirm your submission meets all the criteria

- [ ] Please describe the application briefly.

> _e.g. Audio CD archival tool_

- [ ] Please attach a video showcasing the application on Linux using the Flatpak.

> _drag-and-drop a screencast here, e.g. `Screencast.webm`_

- [ ] The Flatpak ID follows all the rules listed in the [Application ID requirements](https://docs.openpak.org/docs/for-app-authors/requirements#application-id).
- [ ] I have read and followed all the [Submission requirements](https://docs.openpak.org/docs/for-app-authors/requirements) and the [Submission guide](https://docs.openpak.org/docs/for-app-authors/submission) and I agree to them.
- [ ] I am an upstream contributor to the project.
